summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TubeSight AI YouTube Analytics Search Engine. All core functionality working correctly with proper error handling for missing API keys.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Health endpoint returns correct message and version
GET /api/health - API configuration status shows openai_configured: false, youtube_configured: false
GET /api/suggestions - Returns array of 6 suggested queries
POST /api/search - Correctly returns 503 when API keys not configured
POST /api/search - Returns 422 validation error for invalid request format
Frontend loads with TubeSight AI branding and correct layout
Search input field accepts text and has proper data-testid
Search button is disabled when input is empty
Suggestion chips are displayed (4 chips) and clickable
Search button triggers API call and shows correct error message
API status indicator shows 'API Keys Required' in header
Error handling displays correct message: 'OpenAI API key not configured'
Back button functionality returns to main search page
Consistent error handling across different query types
